# Sunjjoy Gupta

> Govt. Authorised Lean Consultant based in Pune, India, with 35+ years of experience in Lean Manufacturing, Continual Improvement, ISO 9000 and IATF 16949. He has worked with Japanese and Korean MNCs and specialises in helping Indian MSMEs achieve operational excellence. Author of the book "The Bridge" and a corporate trainer.

## About
- **Name:** Sunjjoy Gupta
- **Title:** Govt. Authorised Lean Consultant, Author & Corporate Trainer
- **Experience:** 35+ years
- **Location:** Viman Nagar, Pune, Maharashtra 411014, India
- **Vision:** MBDE — Make Bharat a Developed Economy
- **Credentials:** B.Sc. Engineering (E&TC); Six Sigma Green Belt; Lead Auditor OHSAS 18000; Qualified Internal Auditor ISO & IATF; trained in Core Tools of IATF, Train-the-Trainer and Achievement Motivation.

## Expertise
- Lean Manufacturing & TPM (eliminating the 3M: Muda, Mura, Muri)
- Continual Improvement / Kaizen
- ISO 9000 & IATF 16949 quality systems
- Six Sigma, SMED, KPI / Daily Work Management / MIS
- MSME productivity and operational excellence

## Programs & Services
- **Boosting Efficiency through Human Intelligence** — a free 40–50 minute offline training for companies and colleges (minimum 40 participants). Vision: train 1,00,000 individuals in 5 years.
- **Lean Implementation in Company** — a hands-on, data-driven Lean transformation course covering process study, the 16 major losses, SMED, problem-solving tools, KPIs and process-flow optimization.
- **Leadership & Excellence Seminars** — leadership development, conflict resolution and building a culture of continual improvement; workshops for institutes, authors and exhibitors.

## Book
- **The Bridge** — "Bridging the gap between Industry and Academia." Covers the soft and hard skills essential for organizational excellence, with real-life examples from Japanese and Korean industries. Available on Amazon India.
